movesList.name: Chaos
movesList.input: hold Y or Z, To, Up, TU

movesList.name: Inferno
movesList.input: To, TD, AD, push Y or Z

movesList.name: Web Rip
movesList.input: To, TD, AD, push B or C

movesList.name: Web Slap
movesList.input: charge Aw (1 sec), To + B or C

movesList.name: Warp Spider
movesList.input: hold Y or Z, Up, AU, Aw

movesList.name: Guillotine Strike
movesList.input: charge Dn + Y or Z (2 secs), Up, TU

movesList.name: Power Slice
movesList.input: hold Y or Z, Up, TU, Aw

movesList.name: Widow Grip
movesList.input: charge Aw + Y or Z (2 secs), TD, To

movesList.name: Power Vault
movesList.input: Aw, AD, To, push B or C
